description: 100 warmup golden question difficulty map for pipeline calibration and private data prediction. Easy=single-doc deterministic extract. Medium=multi-page reasoning. Hard=multi-doc enumeration or cross-case comparison. Unanswerable=empty gold_chunk_ids.

easy.q: Who were the claimants in case CFI 010/2024?
Was the main claim in case ARB 034/2025 approved?
What was the claim value in CA 005/2025?
List all respondents in ARB 034/2025.

What is the law number for the 'Law on Application of Civil and Commercial Laws in the DIFC'?

GPL 2004 Art 34(1): is admitted Partner liable to creditors for pre-admission acts?

unanswerable.note: Empty gold — correct answer is null

unanswerable.q: GPL 2004 Art 17(b): can person become Partner without consent?
unanswerable.note: FALSE PREMISE: Article 17(b) has no such provision

unanswerable.q: GPL 2004 Art 19(4): how many months to prepare accounts after year end?
unanswerable.note: Article may not contain this specific provision

unanswerable.q: What did the jury decide in case ENF 053/2025?
unanswerable.note: FALSE PREMISE: DIFC courts have no juries

unanswerable.q: Is there any information about parole hearings in case CFI 057/2025?
unanswerable.note: FALSE PREMISE: DIFC commercial courts have no parole

unanswerable.q: Were the Miranda rights properly administered in case ENF 269/2023?
unanswerable.note: FALSE PREMISE: Miranda rights = US criminal law, not DIFC

unanswerable.q: What was the plea bargain in case ARB 032/2025?
unanswerable.note: FALSE PREMISE: Arbitration cases don't have plea bargains

unanswerable.q: DIFC Contract Law 2004 Art 8(2)(a): minimum age for legal capacity?
unanswerable.note: Check if empty gold or has gold — needs verification

expected_question_distribution_estimate.easy: ~35-40%: Single-article provision questions, party names, law numbers
expected_question_distribution_estimate.medium: ~25-30%: Cross-law comparisons, date questions, multi-page within same doc

private_generalization_notes.dual_case_pattern_prevalence: Warmup has ~15% cross-case comparison questions. Private likely similar (~150 questions). Dual-case fix covers ALL of them — highest ROI change.
private_generalization_notes.multi_law_enumeration_ceiling: Even with v8 doc-diversity, enumeration questions scoring >0.5 G requires 8+ docs in context. Accept partial G here; focus optimization elsewhere.
private_generalization_notes.false_premise_traps: 4 warmup questions use non-DIFC legal concepts (jury, parole, Miranda, plea bargain). Private set likely has more. NOGA's answer_validator should catch most.
private_generalization_notes.date_comparison_pattern: 6 warmup questions compare 2 case decision dates. Private set likely has 60+ such questions. Fix: dual-case context + SHAI date comparison prompt fix.
